scripts.db:start: kind create cluster --name lattik --config k8s/kind-config.yaml && kubectl apply -f k8s/postgres.yaml && until kubectl get pod -l app=postgres 2>/dev/null | grep -q postgres; do sleep 2; done && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=postgres --timeout=120s
scripts.gitea:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea.yaml && until kubectl get pod -l app=gitea 2>/dev/null | grep -q gitea; do sleep 2; done && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=gitea --timeout=120s && kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea-init.yaml
